user.title: Pion Power
user.description: Enter the login you use for the Pion Power app.

reconfigure.title: Update Pion Power credentials
reconfigure.description: Enter the email/password to use for this station. Your entities and history are kept.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Pion Power
reauth_confirm.description: The login for {email} was rejected. Enter the current password.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Pion server.
error.no_stations: No stations were found for this account.

data.retry_interval: Reconnect retry interval after the app takes the session (seconds)
data.allow_schedule_write: Allow schedule writes (re-pushes the TOU schedule to the inverter)
